lawschools.basis: evening and weekend programs reachable from Charlotte

program.name: NC Central University School of Law, evening JD
program.commute: about 2 hours, weeknight cohort, hybrid options

program.name: Campbell Law, flex part-time track
program.commute: about 2.5 hours, weekend residencies plus online evenings

program.name: Elon University School of Law, part-time weekend cohort
Charlotte regional hybrid JD, evening and online cohort
